signals.raw: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $119.6M Weekly | YES | HIGH** — XRP recorded its strongest weekly ETF inflows since December for the week ending April 11, with seven spot XRP ETFs approaching $1 billion in combined assets under management[3].
